candidate_definitions.text: Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

[Project X](https://github.com/XTLS) originates from XTLS protocol, providing a set of network tools such as [Xray-core](https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core) and [REALITY](https://github.com/XTLS/REALITY).
Server side implementation of REALITY protocol, a fork of package tls in latest [Go](https://github.com/golang/go/tree/master/src/crypto/tls).
